sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const Dashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); const username = localStorage.getItem("username"); const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken"); const [info, setInfo] = useState({}); const [error, setError] = useState(""); const [showInfoCard, setShowInfoCard] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { if (!token) return; fetch("http://localhost:8000/api/teacher-info/", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, }) .then((res) => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch teacher info"); return res.json(); }) .then((data) => setInfo(data)) .catch(() => setError("Failed to load teacher info.")); }, [token]); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

{/* My Info Button */}
{/* Other Feature Cards */}
📚 Students

Manage all registered students.

👨‍🏫 Teachers

View and update teacher records.

📘 Subjects

Explore subjects offered by the school.

🏫 Classrooms

Assign students and teachers to classes.

📅 Timetable

Manage class schedules and time slots.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

Enter and view student grades.

{/* Expanded My Info Card */} {showInfoCard && (
👤 Teacher Profile

Username: {info.username || "N/A"}

Email: {info.email || "N/A"}

Teacher ID: {info.teacher_id || "N/A"}

{error && (
{error}
)}
)}
); }; export default Dashboard;
